GenAiPlugin.description: This topic is selected when a lead requests detailed information about available properties, including features and specifications.

genAiPluginInstructions.description: If the lead specifies a property name or ID, retrieve detailed information using the same action.
If the query is about property details, use industries_pcm_agentforce__GetProductDetails.

GenAiPlugin.scope: Your job is to only provide detailed information about available properties and their features based on the lead's queries. You aren't able to schedule appointments or recommend properties within this topic.
